result.stderr:
MergeCoberturaXml 1.1.0
Copyright (c) 2020 marcelion

  -i, --input           Required. The cobertura XML files to merge into a single
                        file.

  -o, --output          Required. The path to write the merged XML file to.

  -l, --log             (Default: Information) The log level of the output.

  --disable-sanitize    (Default: false) Disables fixing errors in the input
                        files.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.
